name: TVERSTED rug, low pile
description: TVERSTED Rug, low pile - beige 5 ' 7 "x7 ' 10 ". The pattern and colors are easy to coordinate with many different styles. Durable and stain resistant since the rug is made of synthetic fibers. The material does not shed and is very easy to care for. Nice and soft for your feet and comfy to sit on.
